name: Beike Tripod Q 202F
description: Horizontal Center, Made of High Quality Aluminium, 3-Way Swivel Fluit Head, 4-Section Column Leg

features.Key Features:: Material: Aluminium | Maximum Height : 154cm | Minimum Height : 50cm | Folded length : 43cm | 4 Sections | Tripod Weight : 1.48kg | Max Weight Load : 5kg | 1/4" Screw thread | Adjustable column for flatlay photos | Convertible all in one Tripod solution
features.What’s in the box?: Included: | 1x Tripod | 1x Tripod bag | 1x Manual Book | 1x Kartu Garansi Resmi
